FLOOR_COVERING.ImprovementComponentConditionDescription: Materials have minimal depreciation and appear to be well-maintained.
Materials have minimal depreciation and appear to be well-maintained.
Materials have minimal depreciation and appear to be well-maintained.
Materials have minimal depreciation and appear to be well-maintained.

INTERIOR_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentConditionDescription: Materials have minimal depreciation and appear to be well-maintained.

PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL.UnitValuationCommentText: Subject features vaulted ceiling on the third level and extensive trim throughout second level. The subject is a 3 year old structure, all interior items are original therefore the overall status is considered not updated.

ROOM_DETAIL.RoomConditionAdditionalDescription: Materials have minimal depreciation and appear to be well-maintained.
Materials have minimal depreciation and appear to be well-maintained.
ROOM_DETAIL.RoomQualityDescription: Kitchen includes commercial grade appliances and granite countertops

ROOM_DETAIL.RoomConditionAdditionalDescription: Materials have minimal depreciation and appear to be well-maintained.
Materials have minimal depreciation and appear to be well-maintained.
Materials have minimal depreciation and appear to be well-maintained.
Materials have minimal depreciation and appear to be well-maintained.
ROOM_DETAIL.RoomQualityDescription: Bathroom includes upgraded marble tile and high-end fixtures.

STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentQualityDescription: The exterior walls and trim use upper end finishes and materials. Trim is more extensive than that typically seen for these types of structures.

STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentConditionDescription: Minimal wear and tear with limited physical depreciation.
STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentQualityDescription: Slate shingles are typically considered to be an upper end material for this type of structure.

STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentConditionDescription: Minimal wear and tear with limited physical depreciation.
STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentTypeAdditionalDescri: Mostly double hung windows - some palladian and transom windows noted.

STRUCTURE_DETAIL.StructureValuationCommentText: The subject features higher end materials that are considered to be semi-custom. The dwelling has been well maintained with minimal wear and tear.

MARKET_DETAIL.MarketBoundariesDescription: The subject is bounded on the northwest by Falling Road, east by I270 and south by Montour Road.
MARKET_DETAIL.MarketInventorySearchParameterDescriptio: Attached properties with Above Grade Finished Area ranging from 1,900 to 4,000 Sq. Ft. in the described market boundary area.

PARCEL_SUMMARY_DETAIL.ParcelsLegalDescription: Block H Lot XX of Wheel of Fortune

DEFECT_DETAIL.DefectItemDescription: The hot water heater did not appear to be operational. No hot water.

DEFECT_DETAIL.DefectItemLocationTypeOtherDescription: Lower right corner of rear wall

VALUATION_APPROACH_EXCLUSION_REASON.ValuationApproachExclusionReasonTypeOthe: Not applicable for attached properties as prospective purchasers do not consider individual constuction as a method when purchasing this type of property.

SALES_COMPARISON_APPROACH_DETAIL.SalesComparisonCommentDescription: Comparables #1, #2, #4, and #5 were given most weight based on proximity and similarities to the subject. Comparables #4 and #5 are under contract and included as additional support for the value estimate. The contract price was verified with the agent for both comparables #4 and #5.

VALUATION_COMMENTARY.ValuationCommentText: Lot size is typical to the area.
While subject does not have a direct view of I270, roadway noise can be heard throughout the subject neighborhood.
Project amenities are typical to the market.
The subject's sales contract was analyzed with no seller concessions reported.
The subject is currently under contract for $866,000. Days on market appears to be typical for the area.
The subject features higher end materials that are considered to be semi-custom. The dwelling has been well maintained with minimal wear and tear. Possible termite infestation noted.
Sale from builder to current owner.
Comparables #1 and #4 are the only properties that have had a transfer within the past two years.

VALUATION_RECONCILIATION_DETAIL.ValuationReconciliationSummaryCommentDes: Utilize this subsection for additional commentary as required by USPAP.
